chain.thought: Explanation: Count the matches where no one scored for the group, indicated by an empty "scorers" column. These occur in rows 1, 3, 4, 6, 10, 11, 16, 17, 24, 27, 28, 29, 30, 33, 34, 41, and 42, totaling 17 instances.

judge_thought:
Explanation:
The question refers to instances where "no one did something for this group," which corresponds to matches with no listed scorers (blank "scorers" column). Counting rows with blank scorers: 1, 3, 4, 6, 10, 11, 16, 17, 24, 27, 28, 29, 30, 33, 34, 41, 42. This totals 17 instances.
